sub_goals.description: src/tournament/presets.js — TOURNAMENT_PRESETS array with three seeded presets from Researcher findings + settings form UI

verification_summary: S3.A1-A5 verified. Three presets present with citation-backed values (Friendly Turbo 1500/7/15/10-20; Standard Home Game 10000/20/30/50-100; WSOP-Style Deep Stack 60000/30/45/100-200 BBA 200). Settings form populates on preset select; Custom mode triggers on field edit.
